name: pluginhub
description: qxbyte's Claude Code / CodeBuddy plugin marketplace. Currently hosts specode (spec-driven workflow), task-swarm (multi-agent orchestration) and obsidian-wiki (Obsidian LLM-Wiki maintenance); more plugins to come.

plugins.name: specode
plugins.description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log) in your specs dir. v3.0 added specode-distill sub-skill; v3.1 closes AI-EDS P3-2 (step 2.2 injection renders knowledge content + step 3 design post-check); v3.2 lands FIX-1 (project_root single-source-of-truth via resolve_root verbs) + FIX-2 (knowledge writer rewire via codemap knowledge write) + FIX-3d/3e consumer updates (--include-shared + 🌐 badge).

plugins.name: task-swarm
plugins.description: Multi-agent task orchestration: split a task document into task groups, fork coders, and run per-group reviewer + validator loops. v0.5 added auto ingest_lessons; v0.6 added knowledge-base/*.md dual write; v0.7 rewires ingest to codemap knowledge write (FIX-2) + frontmatter-first project_root (FIX-1).

plugins.name: obsidian-wiki
plugins.description: Maintain an Obsidian LLM-Wiki: deterministic structure layer (Home tree / READMEs / partition pages), SpecIn->knowledge-base distillation + MEMORY, content curation (lint/ingest/curate), and a unified orchestrator. Generic code + per-vault .wiki/config.json, zero hardcoded structure.
